## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm.cmd run check`
- [ ] Runtime integration test, when applicable
- [ ] Live input test, when applicable

## Repository hygiene

- [ ] No game files, saves, extracted data, logs, tokens, or personal paths are included.
- [ ] Documentation and CHANGELOG are updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Any real-game testing performed is described without sharing commercial data.
